# Commit message template

Short summary (50 chars or less)

Longer description (wrap at 72 chars). Explain what changed and why.

Checklist (remove lines that don't apply):
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] `@since` docblock added for all changed/added public symbols (format: `@since vX.Y.Z YYYY-MM-DD`)
- [ ] All CI checks passing

Example:

Feature: Add widget renderer

Adds a new renderer for widgets to improve performance.

- Implements `WidgetRenderer` which replaces legacy code
- Adds unit tests for rendering edge cases

Meta:
- Related: ISSUE-123
- Author: Your Name
